extDescription.message: Capture m3u8 links from selected links, parse media list, and send selected items to Internet File Downloader.

ctx_download_m3u8_link.message: Download this m3u8 with Internet File Downloader

capture_no_m3u8_found.message: No m3u8 links found in selected links or their page requests.

capture_page_desc.message: Select an item and click download to send it to Internet File Downloader.

capture_missing_data.message: Capture data is missing. Please run capture again from the webpage.

optionsBridgeIntro.message: Set the same bridge port as the desktop app. Default is 26519.

hintBridgePort.message: Must match the app Browser helper port. Default is 26519.

introPrivacy.message: Optional. Only enable if a site requires the same browser identity or login cookies for the download.

labelSendUa.message: Include User-Agent when sending a download to the app

hintSendUa.message: Off by default. Turn on if the server rejects requests without a matching browser signature.

labelSendCookie.message: Include cookies when sending a download to the app

hintSendCookie.message: Off by default. Turn on for signed-in downloads. Data is sent only to the app on this computer.

labelSendReferer.message: Include Referer when sending a download to the app

hintSendReferer.message: On by default. Helps sites validate the request source.

statusSaveError.message: Could not save settings. Try again.
